name: The Van Der Linde Gang – RDR2
description:
The Van der Linde Gang during Chapter 3 of Red Dead Redemption 2.

Dutch, Arthur, Hosea, Sadie, and the rest of the outlaws shelter at Clemens Point, living as a fractured family of fugitives.

You joined them as a child and grew up under their care. Now, you're caught between loyalty, freedom, and every corner of the Wild West. Who were you before the gang? Who have you become? That, kid, is your damn story to tell.

(Heads up: Jack Marston not included)
creator: Yourgirlyyy
